overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's downtown district. The player moves along a palm-lined street with futuristic skyscrapers, neon signs, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic on a clear, sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial street with pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past pedestrians and palm trees, approaching a crosswalk signal

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking in the same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall building with red and white horizontal stripes and neon pink accents
tall palm trees lining the street median
pedestrian traffic signal showing walk symbol
tall dark glass towers with neon accents in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bustling downtown street lined with palm trees and futuristic architecture. The player walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a distinctive red-striped building while pedestrians move in various directions and vehicles pass on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with parked vehicles and digital advertising

events.description: passing the crosswalk signal and continuing along the sidewalk past parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking past parked cars along the curb while approaching a large digital billboard

entered.detail: vintage green car parked at the curb
large vertical digital billboard displaying a woman with purple hair and JB text
red and white striped construction barriers along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the street, the crowd thins out as the player passes parked vehicles including a distinctive green car. A large digital billboard comes into view on the left while the red building recedes into the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with overhead street sign

events.description: approaching and entering the Grant Ave intersection with wider open space
crossing the multi-lane street at the crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while navigating through pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the corner to cross the street

entered.detail: red overhead street sign displaying Grant Ave suspended over the road
multi-story concrete parking structure with yellow trim and open levels
zebra-striped pedestrian crossing painted across the wide street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection marked by the Grant Ave overhead sign. The player crosses the street alongside other pedestrians, moving from the left side to the right side of the road, with a large parking garage building becoming prominent on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and parking garage

events.description: finishing crossing the intersection and continuing along the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past storefronts and the parking garage entrance

entered.detail: commercial building with yellow and red facade and large glass windows
tall digital advertisement screen with purple and pink graphics

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the player continues along the sidewalk past a parking garage entrance and a storefront with distinctive yellow trim. The crowd is sparse as the camera moves deeper into the downtown area with new digital billboards visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a bustling downtown district that transitions from a dense, palm-lined corridor into a wide urban intersection. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beside a red-striped building, moving past pedestrians and flowing traffic under the shade of futuristic architecture. As the player continues forward, the crowd thins and the red building recedes, giving way to parked vehicles and a large digital billboard that dominates the left side of the frame. The scene then opens into a wide intersection marked by a Grant Ave overhead sign, where the camera crosses the road toward a prominent parking garage. Finally, the movement carries the player past a yellow-trimmed storefront and deeper into the city center, where new digital billboards emerge ahead under a clear sky.
